description: Style Note provogue lets you know style with this gallantly gorgeous black leather belt. It gives you that new and distinct look that the world is searching for. The brand brings a sense of fashion that is easily understood by the pure unique appearance of this belt. Wear it with a pair of dark blue jeans and let the planet stare. Product Details Black leather belt with a buckle forming the words "Live Mad"  Has brand logo on it and a leather loop Material and Care Leather Use polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Style NoteProvogue lets you know style with this gallantly gorgeous black leather belt.
